zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de St Omer於1235年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布盧達爾時，他的父親Sir William de St Omer25歲，母親Petronilla de Lacy40歲。他於1280年與Margaret de Toeni在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1311年在英國諾福爾可斯文斯索普享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de St Omer于1235年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可布盧達爾时，他的父亲Sir William de St Omer25岁，母亲Petronilla de Lacy40岁。他于1280年与Margaret de Toeni在英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1311年在英国諾福爾可斯文斯索普享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .

nameMeanings.name: Omer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Mohamed, Mohammed, Tarig, Mohammad, Murad, Abdirahman, Abdul, Abdulla, Abdulrahim, Ali, Amin.

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohamed, Ali, Omar, Ahmed, Ahmad, Hassan, Abdul, Husam, Khalid, Mohammad, Mohd.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Omar of uncertain etymology, found almost exclusively among Sunni Muslims. It is thought to be related to Arabic ʿāmir ‘prosperous, full of life, large, substantial’ (see Amir 2). The root word ʿumr means ‘life’. ʿUmar bin al-Khaṭṭāb was the second of the ‘rightly guided’ caliphs (ruled 634–44); he was known by the title al-Fārūq ‘the distinguisher’, i.e. one who distinguishes between truth and falsehood. Compare Omer and Umar .
Catalan: topographic name for someone who lived by a group of elm trees, from the collective form of om ‘elm’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de St Omer was born in 1235, in Brundall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de St Omer, was 25 and his mother, Petronilla de Lacy, was 40. He married Margaret de Toeni in 1280, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1311, in Swainsthorpe, Norfolk, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de St Omer est né en 1235, à Brundall, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de St Omer, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Petronilla de Lacy, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Toeni en 1280, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1311, à Swainsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de St Omer 1235 in Brundall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de St Omer 25 und seine Mutter Petronilla de Lacy 40. Er hat 1280 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England Margaret de Toeni geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1311 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Swainsthorpe, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de St Omer è nato il nel 1235 nel Brundall, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William de St Omer, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Petronilla de Lacy, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Toeni nel 1280, nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1311, nel Swainsthorpe, Norfolk, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de St Omerが1235年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブルンダルで生まれた時，父Sir William de St Omerは25歳，母Petronilla de Lacyは40歳であった。1280年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドでMargaret de Toeniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1311年にイギリスノーフォルクスワインスソルペで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de St Omer(이)가 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브런달에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de St Omer(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronilla de Lacy(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1280년 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 Margaret de Toeni(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1311년 영국 노르폴크 스웨이스소에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de St Omer nasceu em 1235, em Brundall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de St Omer, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla de Lacy, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Toeni em 1280, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1311, em Swainsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de St Omer родился в 1235 г. в местности брундалл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de St Omer было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla de Lacy, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Toeni в 1280 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1311 г. в местности свеинстаурп, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de St Omer nació en 1235, en Brundall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de St Omer, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Petronilla de Lacy, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Margaret de Toeni en 1280, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1311, en Swainsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
